stemHtml:
Given the following data for the pre-flight calculations, determine the minimum taxi fuel (kg) required for a Commercial Air Transport flight with a Performance Class A aeroplane. Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Fuel for engine start: 150 kg
Taxi time at departure aerodrome: 10 min
Taxi time at destination aerodrome: 12 min
Taxi fuel consumption: 60 kg/min
APU time at departure aerodrome: 20 min
APU time at destination aerodrome: 15 min
APU fuel consumption: 840 kg/h
Minimum taxi fuel by company regulation: 900 kg
